title: Peppery Greek Paprika Stir-fry
description: A crisp and peppery Greek dish featuring red chilli flakes in an air-fried twist, perfect for a lazy Sunday dinner.
instructions: In a bowl, mix the chicken pieces with minced garlic and olive oil. Toss gently.
Season the chicken lightly with salt and pepper.
Place the seasoned chicken on a wire rack in an airtight container for air frying. Cook for about 5 minutes per side until golden brown and fully cooked.

While the chicken is cooking, prepare the vegetables by sautéing them in the same pan used to cook the chicken (or another pan if needed) with a bit of olive oil. Add minced garlic, chilli flakes, and red onion for a few minutes.
Add zucchini and red bell pepper to the pan. Cook until veggies are tender but still crisp, about 5-7 minutes.
Once the chicken is fully cooked and set aside, gently fold in the vegetables into the chicken mixture.
Top with fresh parsley before serving.
